description: This repo contains an implementation of a multi-agent concierge system using LlamaIndex's Workflows abstraction. Using this example, you can plug in your own agents and tools to build your own multi-agent system, or hack and extend the underlying code to suit your needs.  In this example, agents are represented by a set name, description, set of tools, and system prompt, which all define how the agent acts and how that agent is selected.  In addition, all agent tools have access to the gl...
